description: This file defines a React component for the homepage of an Asset Health & Maintenance dashboard. It includes UI elements such as asset summaries, alerts, navigation links, and fetches data asynchronously from client-side API functions.

methods.name: healthPill
methods.description: Functions that determines label and styling for asset health scores, categorizing into Green, Amber, or Red.

methods.name: Home
methods.description: Main React component for the home page that fetches dashboard, assets, and alerts data and renders the dashboard UI.
